key.name: enabled
key.summary: Enable audio theme sounds on focus changes

key.name: active-theme
key.summary: Name of the active sound theme directory

key.name: positional-audio
key.summary: Enable 2D positional audio (left-right panning and vertical EQ)

key.name: play-on-focus
key.summary: Play sounds when focus changes between UI elements

key.name: play-on-mode-change
key.summary: Play sounds when switching between focus and browse modes

key.name: speak-roles
key.summary: Whether Orca still speaks role names alongside sounds

key.name: disabled-sounds
key.summary: List of sound filenames disabled by the user (no sound plays for these roles)

key.name: password-typing-sound
key.summary: Sound to play per keystroke in password fields (empty string = off)

key.name: audio-output
key.summary: PulseAudio/PipeWire sink name for all Orca audio (empty = system default)
